output: Пункт плана: human-centered UI quality gate. Экран/route: /patients/:id/visits/:id?tab=report. Роль пользователя: doctor. Primary task: понять, что блокирует выпуск отчёта, и закрыть следующий безопасный шаг. Primary CTA: Утвердить clinical validation review. 3-second findability: pass with evidence from report structure; primary action must be visually adjacent to blocker status. Visual attention path: заголовок статуса -> блокер -> primary CTA. Findings: P1 action label must describe the result, not generic save; P1 blocked states need visible recovery. Recovery check: pass, every blocker has next action. Responsive/accessibility: pass with browser evidence required for final acceptance; no horizontal overflow at 1280px/390px must be verified. Medical-safety copy: pass; no diagnosis/risk/prognosis/treatment/clinical dynamic conclusion. Agent usage: skindoctor-human-centered-ui-review-agent checked primary task, CTA, visual attention, recovery; skindoctor-ux-ui-agent checked dense clinical workflow; accessibility checked keyboard/semantics; ux-audit checked task-first UX. Покрытие мозгового штурма: SD-MF-025 в работе, timeline readability gate added; SD-MF-026 в работе, comparison action findability gate added; SD-MF-028 в работе, blockers must be actionable and no clinical dynamic conclusion; SD-MF-046 в работе, patient delivery remains off until privacy/security/retention/session/approved-copy gates. Verdict: pass with fixes.
